title: selliguea triquetra
intro: Selliguea triquetra, also known as Polypodium triquetrum, is a type of fern commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Selliguea triquetra include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Selliguea triquetra can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
